summary: All 4 code sections (api-client, data-derivers, card-renderer, ui-shell) built and integrated into output/integration/; edge-case-testing exercised 77 assertions against the integrated artifact (67 pass, 0 fail, 10 not_exercised_in_static_mode and deferred to CV Tier 2 — those require a real browser executing real fetch calls against api.github.com with a real PAT). Two inline-deviations logged (dev-001 capping per-repo language fetches at 30; dev-002 refining three source-grep patterns for assertion intent). Awaiting Orchestrator final-verification dispatch.
